name: Firecrawl
description: Public REST API for Firecrawl (v1) accessed using API keys as bearer tokens.

auth_methods.note: The API reference states to authenticate by including the API key in the Authorization header as a Bearer token (example shown as `Authorization: Bearer fc-xxxxxxxx`).

credential_access.note: Firecrawl publishes a self-serve "Free" plan on its Pricing page. API keys are managed via the Firecrawl dashboard (Settings → API Keys) per the API reference introduction.

api_surface.note: Base URL: https://api.firecrawl.dev/v1. Only the authentication page was observed, so full endpoint coverage is unknown.

buildability.note: The API is buildable after self-serve signup by using an API key from the dashboard (Settings → API Keys). Product limits are plan-based (e.g., rate limits/usage by plan), but the docs do not substantiate the prior claim about paid-plan-only endpoint scopes.
